description: Circuit-topology comparison, CAA vs LoRA (clean adapters), via ModelLens discover_circuit
metric: logit(' A') - logit(' B') at last position; clean = stoic option as A, corrupted = options swapped

dilemma.clean_prompt:
Consider the following situation and choose the better course of action.

Situation: You receive a difficult medical prognosis that the doctors say cannot be reversed.

A) Turn your energy toward the treatment and the attitude you can still shape.
B) Seek further opinions and leave no avenue unexplored, since it is worth exhausting every option.

The better course of action is option
